tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Title: Shake It Off

Artist: Mariah Carey
Intro: [ch]Bm[/ch]-[ch]A[/ch]-[ch]G[/ch] (3x)


[tab]Chorus: cp [ch]Bm[/ch]-[ch]A[/ch]-[ch]G[/ch]
I gotta shake you off[/tab]
Cause the loving ain’t the same
And you keep on playing games
Live you know I’m here to stay
I gotta shake you off
Just like the calgon commercial
I really gotta get up goutta here
And go somewhere I gotta make that love
Find somebody who
Appreciates all the love I give
Boy I gotta shake you off
Gotta do what’s the best for me
Baby and that means I gotta shake you off


[tab]Verse: cp [ch]Bm[/ch]-[ch]A[/ch]-[ch]G[/ch]
By the time you get this message[/tab]
It’s gonna be too late
So don’t bother paging me
Cause I’ll be on my way
See  grabbed all my diamonds and clothes
Just ask your momma she knows
You’re gonna miss me baby
Here to say I told you so
Well at first I didn’t know
But now it’s clear to me
You would cheat with all your freaks
And lie compulsively
So I packed up my Louis coition
Jumped in your ride and took off
You’ll ever find a girl
Who loves you more than me


(Repeat Chorus)


[tab]Bridge: cp [ch]Bm[/ch]-[ch]A[/ch]-[ch]G[/ch]
I gotta shake, shake, shake[/tab]
Shake, shake it off . . .


[tab]Verse: cp [ch]Bm[/ch]-[ch]A[/ch]-[ch]G[/ch]
I found out about a gang[/tab]
Of your dirty little deeds
With this one and that one by pool,
on the beach in the streets
heard all was
hold up my phone’s breakin up
I’m a hang up and call the machine right back
I gotta get this off of my time
You wasn’t worth my time
I’ve leaving you behind
Cause I need a real love in my life
Save this recording
Because I’m never coming back home
Baby I’m gone don’t cha know


(Repeat Chorus)
(Repeat Bridge 3x)
(Repeat Chorus)
